Mood
A VERSE FOR THE NIGHT

على قدرِ أهلِ العزمِ تأتي العزائمُ — وتأتي على قدرِ الكرامِ المكارمُ

"To the measure of great souls come great ambitions."

— المتنبي
About

Night runs deep in me.

22sc — the number and the silence. I live between the pitch, the court, and open desert. Quiet by nature, loud in passion. At home somewhere between midnight and the first whistle.

Handle
22sc
Mood
Deep Blue Night
Still, sharp, a little untouchable.
— محمود درويش

أنا لا أعرفُ في الغيبِ طريقي

غيرَ أنّي لا أضلُّ الدربَ نحوي

كلّما ضاقَ بيَ الأفقُ اتّسعتُ

وإذا ما كثُرَ الليلُ ادّرعتُ

بنجومٍ من كلامي أتّقيهِ

وبِصمتٍ واسعٍ أحتالُ فيهِ

Hobbies

Three things that keep me alive.

Connected like a constellation.

01
Football
THE BEAUTIFUL GAME

Ninety minutes where the world stops existing. The grass, the lights, the ball — nothing else matters.

EXPERIENCE10Y
02
Basketball
ABOVE THE RIM

Rhythm, rebound, rise. Basketball is jazz played with a ball — improvised and electric.

EXPERIENCE6Y
03
Horse Riding
BOND WITH THE WIND

Silence that only exists between a rider and their horse. No engines, no noise — just trust and gallop.

EXPERIENCE8Y
Journey

Milestones under moonlight.

2016
FIRST SADDLE

First gallop on open desert ground.

2019
COURT REGULAR

Weekly basketball runs with the crew.

2021
NIGHT MATCHES

Started the late-night football ritual under stadium lights.

2024
THIS SPACE

Built this — a quiet corner of the internet.
